requests.description: Edit Viper Outer Great Barrier Reef Tour: description

new_data.description: Experience the ultimate Whitsunday adventure aboard Viper, the fastest vessel in the Whitsundays, designed for speed and comfort. This award-winning tour offers an unforgettable day exploring iconic destinations, including the Outer Great Barrier Reef and Whitehaven Beach. Perfect for thrill-seekers and nature enthusiasts, this tour combines high-speed travel with the opportunity to snorkel vibrant coral gardens and relax on pristine silica sands. With a small group size of up to 36 guests, enjoy personalized attention and an intimate adventure!
